response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: There was no vocal music present, only dialogue and instrumental background music. The reference JSON was utilized as a general thematic guide for scene structure, but 100% of the transcribed dialog was manually captured from native audio perception. 2. JSON Usage: Fully transcribed dialogue manually. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed directly to vocalizations, with rapid-fire transitions and precise start/end boundaries to prevent cascading delays. Spoken Japanese is fully transcribed in the original language field ('og') and translated into English in the 'en' field.

subtitles.original: And with us, we have our lovely contestants...
subtitles.english: And with us, we have our lovely contestants...

subtitles.original: As said before, we're here to find out who is the ultimate winner of...
subtitles.english: As said before, we're here to find out who is the ultimate winner of...

subtitles.original: And before our commercial break, each contestant will have to compete in our physical obstacle course of fun!
subtitles.english: And before our commercial break, each contestant will have to compete in our physical obstacle course of fun!

subtitles.original: If you're just now tuning in, here is a quick recap.
subtitles.english: If you're just now tuning in, here is a quick recap.

subtitles.original: Everyone starts in a line, you run to the other side while avoiding obstacles, and do a quick little physical activity.
subtitles.english: Everyone starts in a line, you run to the other side while avoiding obstacles, and do a quick little physical activity.

subtitles.original: Grab a question from the dragon, who telepathically gives it to you in your brain, run back and answer the question. Yeah!
subtitles.english: Grab a question from the dragon, who telepathically gives it to you in your brain, run back and answer the question. Yeah!

subtitles.original: We'll do four rounds and the person with the most points at the end of four rounds is the winner!
subtitles.english: We'll do four rounds and the person with the most points at the end of four rounds is the winner!

subtitles.original: Okay! Well, everyone, get into position!
subtitles.english: Okay! Well, everyone, get into position!

subtitles.original: Yeah! Let's go! Let's go! Let's go!
subtitles.english: Yeah! Let's go! Let's go! Let's go!

subtitles.original: I think there's something very big in the way. What is this?
subtitles.english: I think there's something very big in the way. What is this?

subtitles.original: So, so, as said before, of course, since a lot of these questions will be in English...
subtitles.english: So, so, as said before, of course, since a lot of these questions will be in English...

subtitles.original: She'll have a handicap... very, very difficult questions.
subtitles.english: She'll have a handicap... very, very difficult questions.

subtitles.original: What is this? Nice! Nice! Nice! Nice!
subtitles.english: What is this? Nice! Nice! Nice! Nice!

subtitles.original: Okay, okay, okay, everyone in position?
subtitles.english: Okay, okay, okay, everyone in position?

subtitles.original: The first run. The first run is: you run over there...
subtitles.english: The first run. The first run is: you run over there...

subtitles.original: 走って、ファイブジャンプやって...
おいしょ、おいしょ。I was betrayed.
Please read the question out loud.
subtitles.english: Please read the question out loud.

subtitles.original: Okay, you can give me your questions over here.
subtitles.english: Okay, you can give me your questions over here.

subtitles.original: No, no, no, we have to display...
subtitles.english: No, no, no, we have to display...

subtitles.original: Yeah, but is everyone ready for the next round?
subtitles.english: Yeah, but is everyone ready for the next round?

subtitles.original: すごいステップ踏んじゃってる。
subtitles.english: I'm stepping on some amazing steps.

subtitles.original: And now, the crab walk, like this!
subtitles.english: And now, the crab walk, like this!

subtitles.original: 5スクワット？蟹歩きして5スクワット。
subtitles.english: Five squats? Crab walk and do five squats.

subtitles.original: Wait, do they have to jump?
subtitles.english: Wait, do they have to jump?
Do we have to do this going back too?
When going back too. Okay, okay.

subtitles.original: It was close! It was close!
subtitles.english: It was close! It was close!

subtitles.original: Okay, come... Oh, I ripped... I ripped the mind telepathy paper!
subtitles.english: Okay, come... Oh, I ripped... I ripped the mind telepathy paper!

subtitles.original: You can't rip our telepathy paper.
subtitles.english: You can't rip our telepathy paper.

subtitles.original: Yay! She's actually really good at math. She's good at math. Wow!
subtitles.english: Yay! She's actually really good at math. She's good at math. Wow!

subtitles.original: またバナナなんだけど。

subtitles.english: It's banana twice in a row.

subtitles.original: おい、日本語書いてるじゃねえか！
subtitles.english: Hey, isn't Japanese written on it?!

subtitles.original: What? I was given a handicap because the questions are in English, they're written in Japanese!
subtitles.english: What? I was given a handicap because the questions are in English, they're written in Japanese!

subtitles.original: Okay, okay, we gotta keep it rolling, guys. Keep it rolling.
subtitles.english: Okay, okay, we gotta keep it rolling, guys. Keep it rolling.

subtitles.original: Do I still have to go around and around?
subtitles.english: Do I still have to go around and around?

subtitles.original: Those are the rules by our producers, who are not us.
subtitles.english: Those are the rules by our producers, who are not us.

subtitles.original: On my telepathy paper, the next one is... sexy walk.
subtitles.english: On my telepathy paper, the next one is... sexy walk.

subtitles.original: Sexy walk? Sexy, sexy. Okay, okay.
subtitles.english: Sexy walk? Sexy, sexy. Okay, okay.

subtitles.original: Do we get disqualified? Do we have to start again if it's not sexy enough? / Yes.
subtitles.english: Do we get disqualified? Do we have to start again if it's not sexy enough? / Yes.

subtitles.original: Shiori, please make up your mind.
subtitles.english: Shiori, please make up your mind.

subtitles.original: Sexy walk, sexy jump. Sexy jump.
subtitles.english: Sexy walk, sexy jump. Sexy jump.

subtitles.original: セクシーさが足りなかったら、万が一やり直しって言われてるから。
subtitles.english: They said that if it's not sexy enough, we might have to redo it.

subtitles.original: What?! セクシーが足りない？

subtitles.english: Leave it to me, leave it to me.
